title: Update not working on nightly builds
author: goudeseunejJYZ
body_snippet: Wrong versions for nightly builds

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Hi @goudeseunejJYZ, thanks for reporting this!

We've identified the root cause: our nightly release uses `tag_name: nightly` (a static tag) instead of a proper semantic version like `v1.82.0-beta.1`. The update checker can't parse "nightly" as a version number, so it either shows incorrect version info or fails to detect updates.

We're working on a fix to:
1. Parse the version from the release **name** (which contains the actual version) instead of the tag
2. Handle pre-release version compari...
